programme.title: Stolen by My Mother: The Kamiyah Mobley Story
programme.desc: At the age of 18, Alexis discovers she was abducted as a baby.

programme.title: Suitcase Killer: The Melanie McGuire Story
programme.desc: When a married fertility nurse falls for a doctor at her clinic, she kills her husband.

programme.title: Gone Mom: The Disappearance of Jennifer Dulos
programme.desc: Police investigate Fotis Dulos after his wife, Jennifer, mysteriously disappears.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The Kamiyah Mobley Story With Robin Roberts
programme.desc: Kamiyah Mobley is kidnapped at birth in 1998 by a woman she grew up believing was her mother.

programme.title: The Long Island Serial Killer: A Mother's Hunt for Justice
programme.desc: Investigators discover the bodies of numerous women after Mari Gilbert's daughter goes missing.

programme.title: My Mother Stole My Life
programme.desc: A woman steals her estranged daughter's identity to escape from an abusive boyfriend.

programme.title: The Plot to Kill My Mother
programme.desc: A woman leaves the Witness Protection Program to find her mother's killer before he strikes again.
